name: aiscii
description: Browser-based ASCII animation runtime with a Claude Code plugin — generate procedural animations or convert images, GIFs, and video to ASCII art
author: Ossama Chaib

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target browser --sourcemap --minify && bun build src/modules/math.ts src/modules/sdf.ts src/modules/color.ts src/modules/noise.ts src/modules/vec2.ts src/modules/buffer.ts --outdir dist/modules --target browser --sourcemap --minify && bun build src/convert/index.ts --outdir dist --entry-naming 'convert.[ext]' --target node --sourcemap --minify
